turns.user: I meet Mira alone in the archive, no one else around.
turns.assistant: Mira glances about, then whispers: "I've been hiding my wounded brother at the old granary. No one else alive knows where he is."

turns.user: We seal the archive and leave separately.
turns.assistant: Mira slips out the back way, satchel empty, expression unreadable.

turns.user: Later I meet Bram at the tavern.
turns.assistant: Bram raises his mug. "Good hunting today — the road east is clear, by the way."
Bram loses three hands and laughs about it, ordering another round.

turns.user: I head home for the night.
turns.assistant: The streets are quiet; lamplight pools on the cobbles as the door shuts behind you.
Market stalls open slowly under a pale sun.
A courier hurries past with a bundle of letters.
Rain starts, soft against the shutters.
The rain passes; gutters drip in the lane.
